gui.redstone_master.title: Redstone Master
gui.redstone_master.welcome: Hello! Welcome to Redstone Master - a project that teaches redstone!
gui.redstone_master.settings.disclaimer: * Some settings have tooltips. Hover over the button on the right for more details.
gui.redstone_master.settings.pause_on_op: In singleplayer, pauses the world while the mod window is open. Has no effect in multiplayer.
gui.redstone_master.settings.auto_langua: Uses the same language as Minecraft for mod text. When enabled, manual language selection is disabled.
gui.redstone_master.settings.remember_se: When enabled, reopening the mod restores the last tab and settings scroll. When disabled, the mod always opens on the main menu at the top.
gui.redstone_master.settings.close_on_re: Close mod on repeat key press
When enabled, pressing the open key again (default ]) closes the mod. When disabled, use the X button or Esc to close.
gui.redstone_master.settings.reset.toolt: Reset this setting to its default value
gui.redstone_master.settings.reset_all.m: All mod settings will be restored to their defaults. This cannot be undone.
